title: Harris Seriously Good Paperhanging Scissors 12in 102054001
features: These Seriously Good scissors have long stainless steel blades for more accurate cutting
When trimming wallpaper to size these scissors give crisp accurate cuts for nice neat edges
The comfortable handle reduces hand pains when working for a long time
After use clean these sissors with warm soapy water Then dry completely before storing
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Paperhanging Scissors 12" Whats Included Contents 1 x 12in Wallpapering Scissors Ideal Wallpapering Scissors Reason To Buy These 12in scissors have long stainless steel blades for more accurate cutting of wallpaper. Ideal for trimming wallpaper to size. Clean with warm water, dry completely before storing. Other Accessories Don't forget we also have a plumb bob, paste brush and paperhanging kit in the Seriously Good wallpapering range. Harris Painting & Decorating Tools Ranges Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
